name: Okta Stale App Assignment (30 days)
description: Detects active Okta user-to-app assignments with no observed app usage in the last 30 days.
query: WITH app_usage AS (SELECT actor_id AS user_id, target_app_id AS app_id, MAX(published) AS last_app_activity FROM okta_system_logs WHERE COALESCE(target_app_id, '') != '' AND COALESCE(actor_id, '') != '' AND LOWER(COALESCE(event_type, '')) IN ('user.authentication.sso', 'app.oauth2.token.grant') GROUP BY actor_id, target_app_id) SELECT a.assignee_id AS id, COALESCE(u.login, a.assignee_id) AS account_name, a.app_id, a.app_label, usage.last_app_activity FROM okta_app_assignments a LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = a.assignee_id LEFT JOIN app_usage usage ON usage.user_id = a.assignee_id AND usage.app_id = a.app_id WHERE UPPER(COALESCE(a.assignee_type, '')) = 'USER' AND LOWER(COALESCE(a.status, 'active')) IN ('active', 'assigned') AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, 'active')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (usage.last_app_activity IS NULL OR usage.last_app_activity < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days')
remediation: Review stale assignments, confirm business need, and remove unused user access to Okta applications.
